creator: eusteuc@outlook.com
text:
(In reply to Marko Cupać from comment #0)

Have you seen the message after installation? There are some critical values that need to be changed.

Only if the JWT secret not in the valid format, then it tries to generate a new value. Since the config file is read-only, the automatic change will suddenly fail :(

By the way, Gitea's port has a default-but-valid value, so not affected at all.
